detail: Dread Elves, Dwarves of Lostfeld, Elves of Glenhaven, Admiral Electorate, Twin Realms, Vargai Packs, Orcs, Goblins, Red Banner Legion
lore: A new world has been forged. 9 factions (Dread Elves, Dwarves of Lostfeld, Elves of Glenhaven, Admiral Electorate, Twin Realms, Vargai Packs, Orcs, Goblins, Red Banner Legion) now vie for dominance across Aeloria. The age begins — every throne is unsettled, every border unproven.
